articles.title: From Jedi Finales to ElClásico: Disney+ Unleashes a May Lineup That Has It All
articles.summary: Disney+ is stacking May with must-see moments: the 'Star Wars: Maul' finale, a new 'Daredevil' season, and live sports including the PGA Championship and the legendary Barcelona vs. Real Madrid clash.

articles.title: Brain-Scanning Headphones Are Coming—and They Want to Boost Your Focus
articles.summary: Neurable's EEG-enabled headphones, which monitor focus and suggest 'brain breaks,' are moving beyond a single product. Through a new licensing model, the tech could soon appear in gaming headsets, smart glasses, and more.

articles.title: Sinner's Streak Hits 20: He Matches a Djokovic Record and Eyes Madrid Glory
articles.summary: Jannik Sinner extended his winning streak to 20 matches with a straight-set victory over Cameron Norrie in Madrid, becoming only the second man to start a season 20-0 at Masters 1000 events—a feat previously achieved only by Novak Djokovic.
